description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a license_management job in the test stage using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/license-management:$CI_SERVER_VERSION_MAJOR-$CI_SERVER_VERSION_MINOR-stable with an empty entrypoint. The job should allow failure, set the variable SETUP_CMD to $LICENSE_MANAGEMENT_SETUP_CMD, and execute the command /run.sh analyze . It must produce a license_management artifact report saved as gl-license-management-report.json. The job should run only on branch refs and when the $GITLAB_FEATURES variable matches the regex /\blicense_management\b/, and it must be excluded if the variable $LICENSE_MANAGEMENT_DISABLED is set. No caches or services are needed.
